page: Microsoft Azure DC4as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCASv5 server family. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features an x86_64 AMD processor with 4 dedicated virtual CPUs. It is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is explicitly Premium Storage capable. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration. Additionally, the instance does not feature any dedicated GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for accelerated graphics or hardware-dependent machine learning workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and standard 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio position this instance as a stable resource for general-purpose workloads. It is well-suited for applications requiring predictable CPU performance without the variability of burstable models, such as mid-tier web serving, small databases, and general enterprise application hosting.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC4as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCASv5 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD processor. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it provides 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. It features no integrated GPU resources and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the DC4as_v5 offers predictable performance for general-purpose workloads, making it suitable for tasks such as web serving, application hosting, and small database deployments that do not require local disk storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC4as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors, premium storage compatibility, and a stable one-to-four resource ratio.
bullet_points: Powered by an x86_64 AMD processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Supports Premium Storage for external disk configurations
Operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Lacks local storage and integrated GPU hardware
Suited for general-purpose application hosting and web serving
